citation_and_locator: Chan, Sheila S. L. and Lawrence Y. L. Cheung. 2020. Morpho-Syntax of Non-VO Separable Compound Verbs in Cantonese. Studies in Chinese Linguistics 41(2):185–206. DOI 10.2478/scl-2020-0007; official author-hosted journal PDF
what_it_supports: Cantonese inventory of 878 VO and 445 non-VO compounds; web-search plus native-judge criterion; 543 VO items (62%) versus 127 non-VO items (29%) separable; separator-specific `zo2`, `gwo3`, `gan2`, `dak1`, `saai3`, and `jyun4` results; retained lexical identity and separability diagnostics.
limit: The article focuses analytically on non-VO compounds; many introductory VO examples derive from earlier Mandarin literature. Study 1 uses uncontrolled web strings and two judges, while the 45-participant Study 2 targets selected non-VO items. Aggregate VO results do not license any specific Cantonese item or separator without extraction and revalidation.
